titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 71: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 71. (A.R. No. 233 of 1911.) KUMBHAKŌṆAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Nāgēśvarasvāmin temple.

p.hi: Parakēsarivarman, who took the head of Pāṇḍya (Āditya II) Year 3: 963 A.D.

summary.p: Records that the mūlaparuḍai perumakkaḷ (members of the temple committe) of Tirukkūḍamukkil, a dēvadāna in Pāmbūr-nāḍu on the northern bank (of the river Kāvēri), sold two mā of land out of 24 vēli which they obtained as gift from the king on the occasion of (his) coronation ceremony, to Kōyil Mayilai alias Parāntaka Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Siṟṟiṅgaṉ in Iṅganāḍu. The latter set apart the land, (thus purchased) as bhaṭṭavritti for the person who expounds prabhākaram. One person named Parānṭakan figures as signatory.
Published in S.I.I. Vol. III No. 200.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pāṇṭiyaṉṟalaikoṇṭa koppara
kecarivarmaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu vaṭakaraip pāmpūrnāṭṭu
tevatānam tirukRead kuṭamukkilkaṭamukkil mulapaṟaṭaipperumakka
ḷom Iṅkaṇāṭṭuc ciṟṟiṅkaṇ ciṟṟiṅkaṇuṭai
yān koyilmayilaiyāna parān=takamuven=ta
veḷānukku Iṉnampar nāThe length of nā is not marked by the usual kāl but is added as in the case of ṟā and ṉāṭṭu meṟkāviri nāThe length of nā is not marked by the usual kāl but is added as in the case of ṟā and ṉāṅkaḷ Uṭai
yāriṭai AbhiṣekadatṣiṉaiRead dakṣiṇaipeṟṟuṭaiya nilam
2 10 4 veliyilum prabhākaram vakkāṇippārkku bha
ṭṭavrattiyāka Ivvūrile viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam Iraṇṭu
Iraṇṭu māvukkum Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai śālā
bhogamāka viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukku meṟkum te
ṉpāṟkellai meṟkāviri nilattukku vaṭa
kkum melpāṟkellai viṟṟoṅkaḷ ni
lattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai viṟṟo
ṅkaḷ nilattukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta
perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam mū
lapaṟaṭaiyāriṭai vilaikoṇṭaparice candrā
dittavat bhaṭṭavṛttiyāka vaicceṉ parāntakamuventa
veḷāṉeṉ Itu Āyirantiruvaṭiyuṭaiy[ Ār ra]
kṣai ..idam parān=takeṇa lekhā .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
